untranslatable_reason: Signal requires comparison of US 3-month interest rate vs Japanese 3-month interest rate. Interest rate data is not available in the allowed indicators list, which contains only price-action and technical indicators. This signal requires external macro data feeds (e.g., Federal Reserve 3M rate, Bank of Japan 3M rate) that are not supported by the backtesting engine.
translation_notes: The core logic of this signal is interest rate parity arbitrage (carry trade). Entry condition depends on US rate > JPY rate comparison, which cannot be expressed using available technical indicators. A placeholder condition (close > 0) was added to maintain JSON validity, but this rule cannot be properly translated without interest rate data sources. Exit uses a reversal condition per AUTHOR_SILENT guidance.
